verbGlossary.COMMISSIONS: {source} formally initiates a project by engaging designers and consultants for programming and feasibility analysis
verbGlossary.FUNDS THROUGH: {source}provides capital and financial authorization that sustains work through {target}
verbGlossary.GRANTS APPROVALS DURING: {source}reviews applications and issues permits or entitlements required to proceed during {target}
verbGlossary.SETS BUDGET DURING: {source} establishes project budget parameters and cost targets during the estimating {target}
verbGlossary.RECEIVES TRAINING DURING: {source} receives instruction on building systems operation and maintenance during the owner training {target}
verbGlossary.ADVERTISES DURING: Public entity publishes solicitations and bid opportunities to the market during the bidding {target}
verbGlossary.LEADS PRECONSTRUCTION DURING: {source} drives schedule development, value engineering, and constructability reviews during preconstruction
verbGlossary.MOBILIZES FOR: {source} deploys personnel, equipment, and temporary facilities to the jobsite at the start of {target}
verbGlossary.MANAGES COMPLETION DURING: {source} coordinates punch list resolution, closeout documentation, and deficiency correction during a completion {target}
verbGlossary.FINALIZES PAPERWORK DURING: {source} assembles and submits all required contract closeout documentation including lien waivers and warranties
verbGlossary.VALIDATES COSTS DURING: {source}reviews estimates and cost proposals against market data during the estimating {target}
verbGlossary.COORDINATES PLANNING DURING: CM Agency facilitates coordination between owner, design team, and contractors during preconstruction planning
verbGlossary.INTEGRATES DESIGN DURING: Design-builder merges design development and construction planning into a unified delivery process
verbGlossary.FAST-TRACKS DURING: Design-builder overlaps fabrication procurement with ongoing design to compress the project schedule
verbGlossary.OVERSEES FEASIBILITY DURING: {source}evaluates project viability, site constraints, and delivery strategy during programming
verbGlossary.MANAGES HANDOFF DURING: {source}transition of the completed facility from construction team to owner operations
verbGlossary.PRODUCES DOCUMENTS DURING: {source} of record creates construction drawings and specifications during the design development {target}
verbGlossary.REVIEWS SUBMITTALS DURING: {source} reviews contractor submittals and shop drawings for conformance with design intent
verbGlossary.ENGINEERS DURING: Structural engineer designs foundation systems including footings, piles, and grade beams for the foundations {target}
verbGlossary.DESIGNS CONNECTIONS FOR: {source}connection designs and sequences for the structural steel erection {target}
verbGlossary.RESOLVES CLASHES DURING: {source}identifies and resolves spatial conflicts between mechanical, electrical, and plumbing systems above ceilings
verbGlossary.SPECIFIES SYSTEMS FOR: {source}defines equipment selections, duct sizing, and distribution layouts for HVAC installation
verbGlossary.DESIGNS GRADING FOR: {source} develops grading plans, cut-fill calculations, and drainage design for the earthwork {target}
verbGlossary.DESIGNS SUPPRESSION FOR: {source} designs sprinkler, standpipe, and suppression systems for the fire protection rough-in {target}
verbGlossary.PROVIDES RECOMMENDATIONS FOR: {source} delivers soil reports, bearing capacity data, and foundation type recommendations
verbGlossary.CONTRIBUTES SITE DESIGN DURING: Landscape architect develops site layout, hardscape, and planting plans during early programming
verbGlossary.AUTHORS SPECIFICATIONS DURING: {source}produces technical specification sections aligned with drawings during design development
verbGlossary.SPECIFIES FIXTURES FOR: Lighting designer selects luminaire types, circuiting layouts, and control sequences for electrical device installation
verbGlossary.SPECIFIES ASSEMBLIES FOR: {source}defines wall assembly STC ratings and isolation details for drywall and framing {target}s
verbGlossary.DETAILS PERFORMANCE FOR: Building envelope consultant specifies thermal, air, and moisture performance criteria for curtain wall systems
verbGlossary.CERTIFIES PERFORMANCE DURING: {source}verifies that installed systems meet LEED or green building performance targets
verbGlossary.NAVIGATES APPROVALS DURING: {source}plan review and approval process with the authority having jurisdiction
verbGlossary.INSTALLS DURING: {source} performs hands-on installation of their contracted scope during {target}
verbGlossary.APPLIES FINISHES DURING: {source} applies paint, wall coatings, or decorative finishes to prepared surfaces during the finishes {target}
verbGlossary.CORRECTS DEFICIENCIES DURING: {source} returns to site to repair or replace work items identified on the punch list
verbGlossary.RESPONDS TO CALLBACKS DURING: {source} addresses warranty claims and defective work reports during the warranty {target}
verbGlossary.EXECUTES DEMOLITION DURING: {source}carries out selective or full demolition with its own craft labor
verbGlossary.POURS DURING: Self-performing GC division places and finishes slab-on-grade concrete with its own craft workforce
verbGlossary.SHIPS MATERIALS DURING: {source} delivers specified construction materials to the jobsite during the ordering and delivery {target}
verbGlossary.FURNISHES DOOR ASSEMBLIES FOR: {source} delivers pre-hung door frames, hardware sets, and fire-rated assemblies for the doors and hardware {target}
verbGlossary.FABRICATES ASSEMBLIES DURING: {source} manufactures custom components such as structural steel, precast, or curtain wall units off-site
verbGlossary.PROVIDES SHOP DRAWINGS DURING: {source} produces detailed fabrication and erection drawings for architect review during the submittal {target}
verbGlossary.SUPPLIES HEAVY EQUIPMENT FOR: {source} provides excavators, loaders, and haul trucks for earthwork operations
verbGlossary.PROVIDES CRANES FOR: {source} furnishes tower cranes or mobile cranes required for structural steel erection
verbGlossary.INSPECTS MASONRY DURING: {source} verifies mortar joints, grout fills, and reinforcement placement in masonry construction
verbGlossary.TESTS CONCRETE DURING: {source}testing lab performs slump, air content, and compressive strength testing on placed concrete
verbGlossary.PERFORMS COMPACTION TESTING DURING: {source}testing lab conducts nuclear density or proof-roll testing to verify soil compaction during earthwork
verbGlossary.CONDUCTS PRETESTING DURING: {source} executes pre-functional checklists and point-to-point verification on MEP systems before startup
verbGlossary.VERIFIES INTEGRATION DURING: {source} tests cross-system interactions between HVAC, controls, fire alarm, and lighting during integrated testing
verbGlossary.RETURNS FOR SEASONAL TESTING DURING: {source} revisits the facility to test heating and cooling systems under actual seasonal load conditions
verbGlossary.MONITORS ABATEMENT DURING: {source}monitoring firm performs air sampling and clearance testing during hazardous material removal
verbGlossary.ISSUES CERTIFICATE AFTER: {source} issues the certificate of occupancy after satisfactory final inspection
verbGlossary.INSPECTS SUPPRESSION DURING: {source} inspects fire sprinkler and standpipe installation for code compliance during the rough-in {target}
verbGlossary.INSPECTS FIXTURES DURING: {source}inspects plumbing fixtures, backflow prevention, and sanitary connections for health code compliance
verbGlossary.REGULATES HAZMAT DURING: EPA or environmental agency oversees hazardous material handling, containment, and disposal during demolition
verbGlossary.AUDITS COMPLIANCE DURING: OSHA audits contractor safety programs, training records, and site conditions during safety orientation
verbGlossary.REVIEWS ENTITLEMENTS DURING: {source}reviews site plans, variances, and land-use entitlements during the permitting {target}
verbGlossary.RELEASES FINAL DRAW AFTER: Construction lender disburses the final loan draw after verifying project completion and lien waiver collection
verbGlossary.UNDERWRITES BOND FOR: {source} issues a bid bond guaranteeing the contractor will enter into the contract if awarded during bidding
verbGlossary.BINDS COVERAGE FOR: {source}activates builders risk and liability policies covering the project during site mobilization
verbGlossary.ENERGIZES PERMANENT SERVICE DURING: {source}connects and energizes the permanent electrical service for systems startup and testing
verbGlossary.ACTIVATES GAS SERVICE DURING: {source} installs the meter and activates natural gas service for HVAC equipment startup and trim-out
verbGlossary.CONNECTS MAINS DURING: {source}approves and connects building service lines to municipal mains during site utility work
verbGlossary.PROVISIONS SERVICE FOR: {source}provider installs fiber, cable, and network infrastructure for low voltage device activation
verbGlossary.PEAKS DURING: {source} count per project reaches its maximum headcount during a particular {target}
verbGlossary.MEASURED DURING: {source}coverage rate is calculated as the percentage of scopes with qualified bidders during buyout
verbGlossary.VERIFIED BEFORE: {source} insurance compliance is confirmed for all subcontractors before they are allowed to mobilize on site
verbGlossary.BASELINED DURING: {source} safety incident rate is established as a starting benchmark during safety orientation
verbGlossary.TRACKED DURING: {source}is monitored through submittal review turnaround times
verbGlossary.RECONCILED DURING: {source}rate by trade is tallied and resolved as part of contract closeout procedures
